'''shalusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jockeying|jockeying]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jockeying|jockeying]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shalusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shælisith|shælisith]] || [[word:shælisij|shælisij]] || [[word:shælisish|shælisish]] || [[word:shælisi|shælisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalulusuth|shalulusuth]] || [[word:shalulusuj|shalulusuj]] || [[word:shalulusush|shalulusush]] || [[word:shalulusu|shalulusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalusuth|shalusuth]] || [[word:shalusuj|shalusuj]] || [[word:shalusush|shalusush]] || [[word:shalusu|shalusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalufsuth|shalufsuth]] || [[word:shalufsuj|shalufsuj]] || [[word:shalufsush|shalufsush]] || [[word:shalufsuf|shalufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shalusuthu|shalusuthu]] || [[word:shalusuju|shalusuju]] || [[word:shalusushu|shalusushu]] || [[word:shalusuku|shalusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shalusuth|shalusuth]] || [[word:shalusuj|shalusuj]] || [[word:shalusush|shalusush]] || [[word:shalusu|shalusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shalusuthul|shalusuthul]] || [[word:shalusujul|shalusujul]] || [[word:shalusushul|shalusushul]] || [[word:shalusukul|shalusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shalusuthuthu|shalusuthuthu]] || [[word:shalusujuju|shalusujuju]] || [[word:shalusushushu|shalusushushu]] || [[word:shalusuku|shalusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shalusuthun|shalusuthun]] || [[word:shalusujun|shalusujun]] || [[word:shalusushun|shalusushun]] || [[word:shalusukun|shalusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shalusuthuoro|shalusuthuoro]] || [[word:shalusujuoro|shalusujuoro]] || [[word:shalusushuoro|shalusushuoro]] || [[word:shalusukuoro|shalusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
